  "claim_texts": [
    "Approximately 2,372 people experience homelessness on any given night in Contra Costa County.",
    "40% of the homeless population in Contra Costa County resides in West County.",
    "The 2023 Point-in-Time Count identified a 29 percent increase in West County’s unhoused residents between 2020 and 2023.",
    "This event represents how important it is for all levels of government to come together to address the issue of homelessness.",
    "This partnership is needed to get people off the street and into permanent supportive housing.",
